creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thierry Thomas from comment #1)
One obvious difference is that this is for version 0.16, while the other port is for 0.17 (development version).

- The patches to smesh need some care: just removing the functionality is not OK.
- If we are generally building I see no need to split the modules with plugs.
- 0.17 required an ugly hack to the CMake build.

Both ports need more testing, but it's probably easier to work on 0.17 even when it is a moving target.

If the submitter wants to take over and maintain the 0.17 version, I am OK with that.
